fields.label: Contract Type
fields.options:
Lump Sum
Unit Price
Cost Plus
Turnkey (EPC)

fields.label: Letter of Acceptance / signature date
fields.description: Contract formation / LOA date for programmes and claims (FIDIC-style).

fields.label: Contract currency
fields.description: Currency of the contract price (reporting; company default may differ).

fields.label: Primary WBS Task
fields.description: Optional anchor task linking this contract to the project schedule (Omnexa Projects PM).

fields.label: Penalty / LD Clause (text)
fields.description: Narrative clause; use numeric LD fields below for modelling.

fields.label: International contract terms (FIDIC / NEC / ISO21500 alignment)
Governing contract form
fields.options:
FIDIC 2017 Red Book (Building & Engineering)
FIDIC 2017 Yellow Book (M&E Design-Build)
FIDIC 2017 Silver Book (EPC/Turnkey)
FIDIC 1999 Suite (Red/Yellow/Silver)
NEC4 ECC
AIA / ConsensusDocs
Other / Bespoke
fields.description: Indicates which international template the parties largely follow (for audit and reporting).

fields.label: Key sub-clauses / appendix refs
fields.description: e.g. FIDIC Sub-Clause 14.3 IPC, 14.9 Performance Certificate; Particular Conditions clause numbers.

fields.label: Performance security % of contract
fields.description: Typical performance bond / guarantee as % of contract price.

fields.label: Liquidated damages (per day)
fields.description: Pre-agreed delay damages rate where applicable.

fields.label: LD cap % of contract price
fields.description: Maximum LDs as % of contract (common cap in FIDIC-style contracts).

fields.label: Defects notification / liability (months)
fields.description: DNP / defects period in months where defined in contract.

fields.label: Insurance programme summary
fields.description: CAR/EAR, third party, professional indemnity — narrative or policy cross-refs.

fields.label: Project Segment
fields.options:
Infrastructure
Buildings
Roads & Utilities
Industrial EPC
Other
fields.description: High-level segment for reporting (roads, buildings, industrial EPC, etc.).

fields.label: Site / Location
fields.description: Site name, highway chainage, or plant location.

fields.label: Approved Change Orders (value)
fields.description: Sum of cost impact from Construction Change Order in Approved / Implemented status.

fields.label: Revised Contract Value
fields.description: Contract value plus approved change order impact (same basis as IPC billable value).

fields.label: Retention held (IPC, to date)
fields.description: Sum of retention deducted on Certified / Posted IPC certificates for this contract.
